name: portfolio-tracker-web
description: Full-stack portfolio tracker (React + Node.js + Cosmos DB).

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace=backend && npm install --workspace=frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --workspace=backend" "npm run dev --workspace=frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=frontend
